nasb.text: “Though I instilled a terror of him in the land of the living, yet he will be made to lie down among the uncircumcised along with those slain by the sword, even Pharaoh and all his hordes,” declares the Lord God.

esv.text: For I spread terror in the land of the living; and he shall be laid to rest among the uncircumcised, with those who are slain by the sword, Pharaoh and all his multitude, declares the Lord God.”

cnv.text: 雖然我任憑法老使驚恐散布在活人之地，他和他的眾民必在沒有受割禮的人中，與被刀所殺的人一起長眠。這是主耶和華的宣告。”

ccb.text: 我使法老生前给人带来恐惧，但他和他的百姓最后还是要躺卧在未受割礼、丧身刀下的人当中。这是主耶和华说的。”
